default_body.markdown:
## Notes:
- Since version 26.2+, Mojang has introduced the Vulkan rendering engine. If your device does **not** support **Vulkan 1.2**, please do **not** use the **Vulkan backend** to launch the latest version of Minecraft.

## Updates:
- [GP#1222](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/pull/1222): Synced translations from [Weblate project](https://hosted.weblate.org/projects/zalithlauncher2/)
- [GP#1210](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/pull/1210): Added support for customizing the launcher home page using Markdown (by MovTery)
- [GP#1214](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/pull/1214): Store log files separately for each game version (by MovTery)
- [GP#1214](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/pull/1214): Added ability to share and view logs in the version overview (by MovTery)

## Changes:
- [GP#1177](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/pull/1177): Replaced domestic mirror API domain within China (by leemwood)
- [GP#1214](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/pull/1214): Use read-only editor preview when opening dependency project licenses in the About page (by MovTery)

## Fixes:
- [GP#1167](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/pull/1167): imgui loading issue for Veil mod version 3.1.0- (by MovTery)
- [GP#1176](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/pull/1176): Fullscreen not taking effect and system UI components not hiding on some devices (by MovTery)
- [GP#1186](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/pull/1186): Unable to correctly locate the actual directory level when importing saves (by MovTery)
- [GP#1214](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/pull/1214): Upload dialog not closing when canceling game log upload (by MovTery)
- [GP#1217](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/pull/1217): LabyMod 3 and similar clients failing to launch due to incorrect vanilla inheritance logic (by MovTery)
- [GP#1218](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/pull/1218): Angelica mod failing to launch (by MovTery)
- [GP#1219](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/pull/1219): Control layout conflicting with mouse movement on some devices (by MovTery)
- [GP#1221](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/pull/1221): LWJGL missing IME positioning function causing TouchController to crash (by MovTery)

bodies.markdown:
## 提示：
- 26.2+ Mojang 引入了 Vulkan 渲染引擎，若您的设备不支持 **Vulkan 1.2**，请勿使用 **Vulkan 后端**启动 Minecraft 最新版本


## 更新：
- [GP#1222](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/pull/1222)：同步 [Weblate 项目](https://hosted.weblate.org/projects/zalithlauncher2/) 语言
- [GP#1210](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/pull/1210)：支持使用 Markdown 自定义启动器主页 (by MovTery)
- [GP#1214](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/pull/1214)：单独存储每个游戏版本的日志文件 (by MovTery)
- [GP#1214](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/pull/1214)：在版本概览中，可分享、查看日志 (by MovTery)


## 调整：
- [GP#1177](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/pull/1177)：更换中国境内镜像 API 域名 (by 柠枺)
- [GP#1214](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/pull/1214)：关于页面打开依赖项目的协议时，使用只读编辑器预览 (by MovTery)


## 修复：
- [GP#1167](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/pull/1167)：Veil 模组 3.1.0- 的 imgui 加载问题 (by MovTery)
- [GP#1176](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/pull/1176)：部分设备的全屏化不生效、系统UI组件未隐藏 (by MovTery)
- [GP#1186](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/pull/1186)：导入存档时，无法正常寻找到存档真正所在的层级 (by MovTery)
- [GP#1214](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/pull/1214)：取消上传游戏日志时，未关闭上传对话框 (by MovTery)
- [GP#1217](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/pull/1217)：LabyMod 3 等客户端因原版继承逻辑错误，无法正常启动 (by MovTery)
- [GP#1218](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/pull/1218)：Angelica 模组无法正常启动 (by MovTery)
- [GP#1219](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/pull/1219)：部分设备上，控制布局与鼠标移动冲突 (by MovTery)
- [GP#1221](https://github.com/ZalithLauncher/ZalithLauncher2/pull/1221)：LWJGL 缺少输入法定位函数，导致 TouchController 崩溃 (by MovTery)
